column1: # One row per clip. Fill these by scrubbing the video:
#   true_landing_frames   -> frame index of each REAL landing (initial contact)
#                            ';'-separated. Leave empty if the clip has no landing.
#   less_per_landing      -> the human LESS-subset score (0-9) for each landing
#                            Leave empty if you only want to score detection (not LESS).
# written by --analyze) and compares against these labels. No pipeline re-run.
